post.summary: Creates a new application with initial response.

post.summary: Adds a new response version to an existing application.

get.summary: Returns a paged list of the current user's own applications in the current tenant.

parameters.name: TemplateId
parameters.description: Optional template identifier to restrict results to a single template.

parameters.name: IncludeSchema
parameters.description: When true, includes the template JSON schema in each application response.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: One-based page number for paged results.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page.

parameters.name: ApplicationReference
parameters.description: Partial or full application reference to search for.

parameters.name: DateStartedFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date-started (created) range.

parameters.name: DateStartedTo
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date-started (created) range.

parameters.name: DateSubmittedFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date-submitted range.

parameters.name: DateSubmittedTo
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date-submitted range.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Application status filter.

200.description: A paged list of applications accessible to the user.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required permissions

get.summary: Returns a paged list of all applications for the specified template, based on the caller's role (admin or caseworker).

parameters.name: IncludeSchema
parameters.description: When true, includes the template JSON schema in each application response.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: One-based page number for paged results.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page.

parameters.name: ApplicationReference
parameters.description: Partial or full application reference to search for.

parameters.name: DateStartedFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date-started (created) range.

parameters.name: DateStartedTo
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date-started (created) range.

parameters.name: DateSubmittedFrom
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date-submitted range.

parameters.name: DateSubmittedTo
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date-submitted range.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Application status filter.

200.description: A paged list of applications for the template.

get.summary:
Returns templates in the current tenant that the caller can access.
Admins see the full tenant catalogue (including non-live); other users see live templates they have permission for.

200.description: Accessible templates for the current tenant.

403.description: Access denied.

post.summary:
Creates a new template in the current tenant. Admin only.
The creating admin is granted Read/Write template permission.

403.description: Access denied.

get.summary: Returns the latest template schema for the specified template name if the user has access.

400.description: Request was invalid or template not found.

403.description: Access denied.

get.summary: Get custom application statuses for a template.

post.summary:
Create or update a custom application status for a template.
If a CustomApplicationStatus for the TemplateId and ApplicationStatus exists, update its label; otherwise create one.
Returns the created or updated CustomApplicationStatus.

put.summary: Sets whether a template is live for end users. Admin only.

403.description: Access denied.

post.summary:
Triggers an immediate refresh of the in-memory tenant configuration cache.
Requires an interactive Admin user JWT.

403.description: Forbidden - interactive Admin user required.

get.summary:
Returns a summary of the caller's own tenant (not the full SaaS catalogue).
Requires an interactive Admin user JWT.

403.description: Forbidden - interactive Admin user required.

post.summary:
Seeds tenant configuration from appsettings into the tenant config database.
Platform-only: requires Platform.TenantConfig.Read (machine / platform app role).

403.description: Forbidden - Missing Platform.TenantConfig.Read app role.

put.summary:
Adds or updates a configuration section for the caller's own tenant only.
Requires an interactive Admin user JWT; the route tenantId must
match the resolved tenant context.

403.description: Forbidden - interactive Admin of own tenant required.

get.summary: Returns the merged 'Shared' + target-specific configuration for the calling principal's tenant.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The consuming application's target. One of: Web, Api, Shared. Defaults to Web.

403.description: Principal is not registered to any tenant.

404.description: Tenant inactive or no longer exists.

get.summary:
Returns merged configuration for the specified tenant. For platform callers (shared Web container)
that resolve the tenant from the request hostname or X-Tenant-ID.

403.description: Missing Platform.TenantConfig.Read app role.

404.description: Tenant inactive or no longer exists.

get.summary: Resolves a tenant id from an HTTP hostname using TenantHostnames.

403.description: Missing Platform.TenantConfig.Read app role.

404.description: Hostname not mapped to any tenant.
